faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Products
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about our security products.
faq.q1: What web development services do you offer?
faq.a1: We offer high-quality secure website and web application development, with security built in from the design stage. We use industry best practices and modern technologies to deliver robust, protected applications.
faq.q2: What is included in the security training?
faq.a2: Our training covers everything from digital security basics to advanced use of security tools. It includes hands-on practice, completion certificates and ongoing support after the course.
faq.q3: How does secure AI training work?
faq.a3: We teach you to use artificial intelligence tools responsibly without exposing sensitive data. You will learn anonymization techniques, privacy best practices and how to implement AI safely in your company.
faq.q4: What is included in attack prevention services?
faq.a4: It includes vulnerability analysis, implementation of preventive measures, continuous monitoring, firewall configuration and intrusion detection systems. We offer custom plans based on your company size.
faq.a5: We provide fast 24/7 response to security incidents. Our team analyzes the attack, contains the threat, restores affected systems and provides a detailed report with recommendations to prevent future incidents.
faq.a6: Yes, we offer customized business plans that combine multiple services. Contact our team for a free consultation and a quote tailored to your organization's needs.

cryptoPayment.title: Cryptocurrency Payment
cryptoPayment.description: Pay securely with Bitcoin, Ethereum or other cryptocurrencies.

web_dev.name: Secure Web and App Development
web_dev.description: We create high-quality websites and applications with built-in security by design. We use the latest technologies and industry best practices to ensure an exceptional and secure product.

sec_training.name: Digital Security and Tool Training
sec_training.description: Comprehensive training program on digital security and proper use of protection tools. Learn how to protect your information and privacy using the best tools on the market.

ai_training.name: Secure AI Training: Usage without Data Exposure
ai_training.description: Learn to harness the power of artificial intelligence without compromising your data security. This training teaches you anonymization techniques and safe LLM usage to boost productivity safely.

attack_prevention.name: Attack Prevention and Enterprise Security
attack_prevention.description: Comprehensive cyber attack prevention service for your website and business. We implement multiple layers of security, continuous monitoring, and preventive measures to protect your digital assets against current and emerging threats.

incident_response.name: Rapid Incident Response
incident_response.description: Immediate response service for cyber attacks and security breaches. Our specialized team acts quickly to contain threats, recover systems, and prevent future incidents, available 24/7/365.

7.question: How do you guarantee security in web development?
7.answer: We implement security by design, following OWASP Top 10 guidelines, encrypting sensitive data, and performing static and dynamic code analysis before deployment.

7.question: What technologies do you use to build secure applications?
7.answer: We use robust frameworks like React, Next.js, Node.js, and secure databases like PostgreSQL, integrating Web Application Firewalls (WAF) and multi-factor authentication (MFA).

7.question: Does the developed code belong to me?
7.answer: Yes, once the project is completed and payment is finalized, 100% of the intellectual property rights and the source code are fully transferred to your organization.

8.question: Who should take this training?
8.answer: It is designed for all company personnel, from administrative roles to executives, in order to strengthen the weakest link in the security chain: the human factor.

8.question: Is the training theoretical or practical?
8.answer: It is 80% practical. We conduct real-time phishing simulations and configure daily privacy tools directly on the attendees' devices.

8.question: Do you provide certificates of completion?
8.answer: Yes, we issue a verifiable digital certificate for each participant who completes the modules and passes the final course assessment.

9.question: What risks does this training mitigate?
9.answer: It prevents the accidental leakage of intellectual property, customer data, or trade secrets into third-party public AI models, ensuring compliance with privacy regulations.

9.question: Do you teach how to implement local (On-Premise) AI models?
9.answer: Yes, we teach you how to configure and run open-source Large Language Models (LLMs) locally on your own infrastructure to guarantee total data sovereignty.

9.question: Does it require prior programming knowledge?
9.answer: It is not necessary. We adapt the content for both non-technical users who use AI in their daily work and development teams integrating APIs.

10.question: How does the threat monitoring service work?
10.answer: We constantly monitor traffic and system integrity for anomalies, intrusion attempts, and malicious patterns, automatically blocking them in real time.

10.question: Do you perform penetration testing (Pentesting)?
10.answer: Yes, as part of the service we perform controlled simulations of real attacks to identify weaknesses in the network and applications before an attacker does.

10.question: Is it suitable for small and medium-sized businesses (SMEs)?
10.answer: Absolutely. We design scalable plans and customized defenses according to the size and infrastructure of each company, ensuring optimal protection without excessive costs.

11.question: What is the response time for an active incident?
11.answer: Our incident response team is available 24/7/365 and responds immediately after the initial report to begin containment.

11.question: What should I do if I suspect my company is under a ransomware attack?
11.answer: Immediately disconnect affected systems from the network and contact our specialized team to prevent propagation and guide you through the recovery process.

11.question: Do you guarantee full recovery of encrypted data?
11.answer: We do everything possible using advanced techniques and digital forensics. If clean backups are available, we guarantee full restoration. If not, we analyze the encryption type to check for known decryptors.
